whatWasImplemented: supabase/migrations/20260419090000_sent_emails.sql — ledger table (user_id, template, period) UNIQUE. RLS: service-role writes only, owners read their own. Indexed on user_id for cleanup and dashboard lookups.

src/lib/email/send.ts — Resend SDK wrapper. No-ops when RESEND_API_KEY absent (dev + CI safe), rejects on empty recipient, surfaces transport errors without blocking callers. List-Unsubscribe header included.

src/lib/email/templates.ts — renderWelcome / renderTrialEnding / renderQuotaWarning / renderPaymentFailed pure functions returning { subject, html, text }. Currency amounts formatted as N.NN USD; quota percentage rounded; all interpolate the recipient email for signal.

src/lib/email/transactional.ts — sendOnce(admin, userId, template, period, to, render) primitive: insert-first idempotency. 23505 conflicts yield 'duplicate' without a send. Four thin wrappers (sendWelcomeEmail, sendTrialEndingEmail, sendQuotaWarningEmail, sendPaymentFailedEmail) encode each trigger's period key (welcome=initial, trial_ending=YYYY-MM-DD, quota_warning=period_start ISO, payment_failed=invoice_id).

src/lib/email/quota-trigger.ts — maybeSendQuotaWarning extracted so chat/session tests can mock a small boundary. Guards the arithmetic crossing (used >= ceil(limit*0.8) && used-1 < threshold) so steady-state >80% users don't re-trigger, with the ledger as a backstop for plan-change cap jumps.

src/app/auth/callback/route.ts — on successful code exchange or OTP verify, fires maybeFireWelcomeEmail via service-role client. Gated on SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY and wrapped in try/catch so email failure never breaks the redirect (VAL-HARD-006).

src/app/api/chat/session/route.ts — after successful increment_message_counter, calls maybeSendQuotaWarning with the owner's user_id and post-increment used/limit so the 80% email fires once per billing period (VAL-HARD-008).

src/app/api/stripe/webhook/route.ts — handleInvoicePaymentFailed now also fires sendPaymentFailedEmail after flipping subscription_status to past_due. Uses invoice.customer_email when present, falls back to profiles.email; period = invoice.id for exact-invoice idempotency (VAL-HARD-009).

src/app/api/cron/trial-ending/route.ts — GET endpoint for Vercel Cron (Bearer CRON_SECRET auth). Queries profiles WHERE subscription_status='trialing' AND trial_ends_at IN [now+3d, now+4d), loops and fires sendTrialEndingEmail per row. Returns { candidates, sent, duplicates, errors } summary (VAL-HARD-007).

src/__tests__/email-transactional.test.ts — 15 tests: sendOnce idempotency (insert-first, 23505 dupe, non-conflict error, transport error), four wrapper period keys + payloads, template-shape assertions, RESEND_API_KEY-absent skip, empty recipient reject.
src/__tests__/email-cron-trial-ending.test.ts — 5 tests: unauthenticated vs bearer, query-window (exact 24h gap between gte+lt), per-row tally, same-day ledger dedupe.
src/__tests__/auth-callback-route.test.ts — extended with mocks for @/lib/supabase/service and @/lib/email/transactional so the welcome wiring stays silent in tests.

src/__tests__/chat-session.test.ts + message-quota.test.ts + responses-integration.test.ts — mock @/lib/email/quota-trigger as a vi.fn() no-op so the chat route's new email call stays out of those fixtures.
whatWasLeftUndone: Live Resend dashboard evidence (VAL-HARD-006..009 hit Resend's logs). Requires RESEND_API_KEY + a Resend test audience on deploy. Code paths are unit-tested at the boundary; Brandon validates in the Resend dashboard when he plugs in the test-mode API key.
react-email components — skipped in favor of plain HTML strings. Switching is a drop-in if brand wants templated designs; render* functions are the seam.
Vercel cron schedule config (vercel.json with `crons: [{ path: '/api/cron/trial-ending', schedule: '0 12 * * *' }]`). Brandon to add during deploy — code path is ready.
discoveredIssues: stripe-webhook test is integration-style against real Supabase. Because sent_emails table + insert succeed for real and sendEmail no-ops without RESEND_API_KEY, no mock needed — the path exercises itself end-to-end during the existing invoice.payment_failed test.
chat/session route's existing table-routed test mock throws on unknown tables; extracting maybeSendQuotaWarning into its own module and mocking it keeps the existing Supabase mock unchanged.

verification.testsRun: pnpm vitest run — 607 passing / 1 skipped / 72 files (+20 email tests).

manualChecks.expected: inserts ledger, calls sendEmail, returns { status: 'sent' }

manualChecks.action: Cron with 3 candidates, outcomes [sent, duplicate, error]

manualChecks.expected: welcome email fire-and-forget skipped, redirect still happens
